title: Introduction to Debugging Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of software debugging.

questions.question: What is the primary role of debugging in software development?
options: To identify, analyze, and remove errors or 'bugs' from your project's code

questions.question: Regarding the debugging, why is it beneficial to identify and fix errors before they reach your users?
options: It ensures a smooth and bug-free user experience
It makes your code build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
